text:
FAULT DIAGNOSIS

3.0 	GENERAL

The Radio set being modular in construction, fault can be easily traced and pin pointed by isolating the faulty module whenever the set fails to operate. The repair of a faulty set can be performed only with good background knowledge of the working of the set. 

Whenever the Receiver Transmitter develops a fault, the troubleshooting procedure given below may be followed. Many symptoms are discussed along with probable faulty module/component. If a module is suspected it can be tested, before replacing it with a Spare module. The objective is to make sure that the module in question is indeed faulty before replacing and to avoid arbitrary replacement of modules. The faulty module can be then thoroughly checked by referring to the Technical Mechanical Part III Overhaul and Reconditioning Instructions. 

3.1     TROUBLESHOOTING

The following procedure will enable to quick the effective repair of  Secure HHPC , to identify the faulty module. These methods provide an elementary fault finding procedure. It is not exhaustive and may be used as broad guidelines only.

3.1.1   TROUBLESHOOTING WITH THE HELP OF FLOWCHARTS

1. The troubleshooting has been covered systematically system wise and then card/Module wise. The following layout for the fault diagnosis is to be followed.

Procedure-1:  Dead unit troubleshooting flowchart : This procedure is to followed when Radio Set is dead.

Procedure-2: BITE check : This procedure is to check the failure of any module in BITE.

    Procedure-3:Display/Keypad Troubleshooting : This procedure is to locate the fault whenever             any problem with display or keypad.

Procedure-4:Troubleshooting in Receiver path : Whenever there is no reception in the Radio Set, this procedure is to followed.

Procedure-5 Troubleshooting in Transmitter : Whenever there is transmission problem with the radio set, this procedure is followed.

Procedure-2: BITE check: This procedure is to check the failure of any module in BITE.

Procedure-3: Display/Keypad Troubleshooting: This procedure is to locate the fault whenever any problem with display or keypad.

Procedure-4: Troubleshooting in Receiver path: Whenever there is no reception in the Radio Set, this procedure is too followed.

Procedure-5 Troubleshooting in Transmitter: Whenever there is transmission problem with the radio set, this procedure is followed.
